_comment_purpose: LLM config consumed by `commit0-infer` (OpenHands benchmarks runner). Pins the same model OpenHands used for their published 7/16 Sonnet 4.6 result so reproductions are apples-to-apples.
_comment_pricing_ref: Standard Sonnet 4.6 list pricing as of 2026-04: $3/MTok input, $15/MTok output, $0.30 cache_read, $3.75 cache_write. Same numbers OpenHands' metadata.json reports for claude-sonnet-4-6.
